name: Low-Fat Corn Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
Use part-skim mozzarella and nonfat ricotta. Preheat oven to 325°F.
Spray a 9" x 13-inch baking dish with nonstick vegetable spray. In a mixing bowl, combine mozzarella, corn, ricotta, egg, oregano, salt, and pepper. Pour about 3/4 cup of sauce into the bottom of the baking dish. Layer half of the noodles over the sauce and top with half of the cheese mixture. Repeat layering with remaining noodles and cheese mixture. Spread remaining sauce over top. Carefully pour water around the edges and sprinkle with mozzarella. Tightly cover pan with foil and bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes. Let rest for 10-15 minutes before serving.
